text: I love planning a trip almost as much as the journey itself. First, I research the destination, learning about new cultures and their customs. Once there, the food is always a highlight—trying local dishes like street noodles or fresh seafood. However, language barriers can be tricky. I remember once in Italy, I accidentally ordered four coffees instead of one, but the waiter laughed and taught me the correct phrase. These small moments become the best memories. Looking back, every trip feels like a treasure chest of experiences that I carry with me forever.
